purpose.title: Purpose
purpose.text: This contract defines what every Stage 2 verification record must carry before a repair may move toward deploy or close-out.

matching_rules.title: Matching Rules
items: verification scope must match the declared change scope
`inconclusive` must explain what is still unknown
if no regression asset was added, the record must say whether it was deferred or not applicable

failure_rules.title: Failure Rules
items: repeated inconclusive results require explicit human review before deploy
verification cannot silently rewrite the incident summary or severity

close_out_rules.title: Close-Out Rules
items: close-out must carry the latest verification record ref
close-out must restate residual risk when the result is not a clean pass
verification provenance must remain visible even when the repair is rejected or deferred
